name: wasabi-coinjoin
title: Wasabi CoinJoin over USB
description: Pre-approved remote signing over USB for Wasabi Wallet: SLIP-19 ownership proofs and policy-checked PSBT signing for WabiSabi coinjoin (and plain batched multi-wallet transactions). Host-proposed policy approved on the device, Trezor-style.
author: kravens

distribution.signing: PGP signature + SHA256 of released .mpy, verified on-device against the dedicated kapp signer key (KAPP_SIGNER_PUBKEY)
distribution.note: Primary form is the signed kapp (kapps/coinjoin_usb.mpy). The src/krux/extensions package is a fallback for build-time freezing into firmware where the kapps framework is unavailable.
